info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Policy Management API
info.description: The Policy Management API allows users to efficiently create and manage various policies within the microservice environment. This API facilitates the submission of new policy data, ensuring that all relevant details are captured accurately. It is primarily designed for developers and system administrators looking to integrate policy management functionalities into their applications. Typical use cases include defining, updating, or refining organizational policies in alignment with business objectives.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new insurance policy by providing the necessary details. Ensure all required fields are filled out to successfully create a policy.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new policy. It should contain all required fields as defined in the schema. Ensure that the JSON object adheres to the correct structure for successful processing.

200.description: Request completed successfully, returning the created resource.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.title: PolicyResponse

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the policy.

coverageAmount.description: Total coverage amount provided by the policy.

premiumAmount.description: Monthly premium amount to be paid for the policy.

status.description: Current status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive).

startDate.description: Start date of the policy in ISO 8601 format (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD).

endDate.description: End date of the policy in ISO 8601 format (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD).

message.description: Optional message regarding the policy response.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.description: Represents the response object for creating a policy operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.title: Policy Creation Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

policyType.description: The type of insurance policy being requested.

coverageAmount.description: The total amount of coverage for the policy.

premiumAmount.description: The premium amount to be paid for the policy.

startDate.description: The start date of the insurance coverage in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: The end date of the insurance coverage in ISO 8601 format.

beneficiaryName.description: The name of the beneficiary for the insurance policy.

paymentMode.description: The mode of payment for the premium (e.g., monthly, annually).

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a new insurance policy.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.title: Error Response for POST Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the response indicating whether the operation was successful.

error.description: A short description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A detailed message describing the nature of the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The path of the requested resource that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error, for debugging purposes.

details.description: Additional details about the error that occurred.

suggestion.description: A suggestion to the user on how to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.description: This schema defines the structure of the error response returned when a POST operation fails with a 404 status code.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-ErrorDetai.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer related to the error.

errorCode.description: An arbitrary error code associated with the failure.

message.description: A message providing more context about the error.
message.example: Customer in question could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-ErrorDetai.description: This schema contains additional information about the error that occurred.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
